calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Ryan L. Dahm, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MICHAEL S. KENNEDY, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA DIVINE PIZZA.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $36,466.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $4,815.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $840.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $43,121.00
Judgment signed in open court.

MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT is Off calendar. Sysco San Francisco, Inc. did not timely file proof of service for the motion. (Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1300(c).) On February 6, 2014, Sysco San Francisco, Inc. filed a declaration of non-service. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
